modules.name: Fence
modules.description: Keep CVs in a defined pitch range

modules.name: Swing
modules.description: Micro Timing Sequencer

modules.name: Mother
modules.description: Mode aware probability driven quantizer

modules.name: Phrase
modules.description: Utility to sequence phrases by sequencing a sequencer

modules.name: Dejavu
modules.description: Random Cv and Trigger generator with nested repeat functionality

modules.name: Gator
modules.description: Phased Based Microtiming, Ratcheting and Strumming

modules.name: Resc
modules.description: Utility to harmonicaly rescales pitch from one scale to another scale

modules.name: Morph
modules.description: Morphing of given or random sequences with turing machine functionality

modules.name: Morpheus
modules.description: Morphing of given or random sequences with turing machine functionality and 16 Internal Memory Slots.

modules.name: Buckets
modules.description: Splits up polyphonic pitch and gate input into up to 12 polyphic pitch and gate outputs, depending on pitch value, chainable

modules.name: Cron
modules.description: Interface Module for MIDI>CV deriving BPM from MIDI CLK and 24 pmm CLK/N, handling Transport and calculating CMP cv for GATOR for latency compensation of up to 16 channels

modules.name: Hold
modules.description: A polyphinic s&h module which strores its state with the preset.

modules.name: CV-LANES
modules.description: Merges up to 16 polyphonic CV sources into 16 dynamically allocated polyphonic lanes with voice stealing. Attach LANES-CV and/or LANES-MIDI expanders to the right to read the lanes out as CV or MIDI

modules.name: MIDI-LANES
modules.description: Merges up to 16 incoming MIDI channels into 16 dynamically allocated polyphonic lanes with voice stealing, mirroring CV-LANES for MIDI input. Attach LANES-CV and/or LANES-MIDI expanders to the right to read the lanes out as CV or MIDI

modules.name: LANES-CV
modules.description: Expander for CV-LANES/MIDI-LANES: reads its 16 lanes out as polyphonic CV/Gate/Velocity/Overflow jacks

modules.name: LANES-MIDI
modules.description: Expander for CV-LANES/MIDI-LANES: sends its 16 lanes as MIDI Note On/Off/Velocity, one freely assignable MIDI channel per lane, for multi-timbral multi-channel MIDI interfacing

modules.name: K2C
modules.description: Routes polyphonic notes to 16 fixed output channels by exact pitch match against a CV-defined target pitch per channel

modules.name: CC14
modules.description: Combines two 7 bit MIDI CC CVs into a 14 bit CV and splits a 14 bit CV back into MSB/LSB 7 bit CC CVs

modules.name: D2D
modules.description: Splits drum sequencer gate/velocity into Dejavu's HEAT OFFSET gate and curved, attenuated HEAT SCALE CV

modules.name: CC2CV
modules.description: Receives up to 128 MIDI CCs and outputs them as 8 polyphonic CV banks of 16 channels each, fixed mapping, no MIDI learn

modules.name: CV2CC
modules.description: Sends 8 polyphonic CV banks of 16 channels each as up to 128 MIDI CCs, fixed mapping, no MIDI learn

modules.name: RECALL
modules.description: Gates a bidirectional CC connection receive-only in normal operation, with a one-shot full push-sync of Rack's own data on demand or at startup

modules.name: MIDIBUS
modules.description: Single-channel MIDI processor insert: receives and sends Notes, CCs, Program Change and Clock/Transport/SysEx on independently selectable channels, with an infix per signal to intervene along the way - passes straight through by default

modules.name: J
modules.description: 8-input AND gate: fires a fixed-length trigger/gate (1-10ms, knob-adjustable) the instant every patched input is simultaneously high - built to resync signals that diverged in timing across different patch branches

modules.name: X8
modules.description: Generic param-access Expander (step 1: host connection detection only, no param access yet) - attach to the left of a compatible host to remote-control one of its polyphonic params per channel

modules.name: X8D
modules.description: Wider X8 (6HP) with room for a per-channel numeric display next to each knob - attach to the left of a compatible host to remote-control one of its polyphonic params per channel

modules.name: X16
modules.description: Two columns of 8 knobs (16 channels) - attach to the left of a compatible host to remote-control one of its polyphonic params per channel

modules.name: X16D
modules.description: Two knob+display columns (16 channels) - attach to the left of a compatible host to remote-control one of its polyphonic params per channel

modules.name: XO8
modules.description: Read-only output-side Expander - attach to the right of a compatible host to split one of its polyphonic outputs into 8 mono jacks

modules.name: XD8
modules.description: Read-only output-side monitor, no jacks - attach to the right of a compatible host to watch one of its polyphonic outputs (8 channels)

modules.name: XOD8
modules.description: Wider XO8 (6HP) with a per-channel value/gate display next to each jack - attach to the right of a compatible host to split and monitor one of its polyphonic outputs

modules.name: XO16
modules.description: Two columns of 8 jacks (16 channels) - attach to the right of a compatible host to split one of its polyphonic outputs

modules.name: XD16
modules.description: Read-only output-side monitor, no jacks - attach to the right of a compatible host to watch one of its polyphonic outputs (16 channels)

modules.name: XOD16
modules.description: Two jack+display columns (16 channels) - attach to the right of a compatible host to split and monitor one of its polyphonic outputs

modules.name: XR8
modules.description: 8 channels of deterministic seeded-random values, derived from a compatible host's polyphonic output - attach to the right of a compatible host

modules.name: XR16
modules.description: 16 channels of deterministic seeded-random values, derived from a compatible host's polyphonic output - attach to the right of a compatible host

modules.name: STYX
modules.description: Resizable bidirectional tape/memory viewer and editor for a compatible sequencer host (Morpheus) - attach on either side
